label: Spiking neural networks

node.label: Spiking neural networks
node.definition: A spiking neural network communicates with discrete events and evolving membrane states, supporting temporally precise and potentially energy-efficient computation.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Spiking neural networks is modeled as depending on Spiking neurons & temporal coding, Recurrence & feedback state and feeding downstream nodes such as Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
examples: atlas downstream link to Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
atlas downstream link to Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Spiking neurons & temporal coding, Recurrence & feedback state.

dependencies.rationale: Spiking neural networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Spiking neurons & temporal coding.
In this atlas graph, Spiking neural networks has a `composes` dependency on Recurrence & feedback state with `core` strength.
Spiking neural networks rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
